## v6.3.1

### Fixed
- **Nightly retention prunes failed with "repository is already locked"** (#94). An orphaned restic lock — typically left behind when the container is updated or restarted in the middle of an operation — blocked every retention pass of the night: `forget` needs an exclusive lock, so even a stale non-exclusive lock (which lets the backups themselves keep succeeding) failed retention for every item, and since v6.2.0 each failure sent a notification. Retention now heals this itself, the same way verify does since v6.3.0: it force-unlocks the provably orphaned lock and retries once — BombVault is the repository's only writer and holds its own domain lock at that moment, so the removed lock can never belong to a live operation. A notification is only sent if the retry still fails.
